# Beyond Autocomplete: How Agentic AI Solves the Enterprise Design Bottleneck — Agentic AI Build Week Workshop

[GenAI Fund - Official](https://luma.com/gaf?k=c)

Jul

10

Friday, July 10

2:00 PM - 3:00 PM GMT+7

Register to See Address

Thành phố Hồ Chí Minh, Vietnam

Welcome! Please choose your desired ticket type:

Request to Join

You will be asked to verify token ownership with your wallet.

About Event

Most AI tools generate plausible pixels, not usable systems. **Linh Nguyen** shows you the difference — and why it matters for anyone building real products.

 **What you'll take away**

- A demo-driven walkthrough of agentic AI that plans, executes, and self-corrects toward a result you can actually ship

- How Obello treats brand guidelines as executable constraints — using their real work as the example

- A new way to think about what AI systems should do for you

 **Your speaker**

- **Linh Nguyen** — Google Developer Expert (AI/ML) & Head of AI at Obello. The first woman in Vietnam named to Google's Developer Expert program for AI, with 14 years in NLP & machine learning and a Master's from the National University of Singapore.

 **Event details**

- 📅 Thursday, July 10, 2026

- 🕐 2:00 PM – 3:00 PM (Indochina Time, GMT+7)

- 📍 VNG Group JSC, Ho Chi Minh

- 🎟 Part of Agentic AI Build Week (July 8–12, 2026)

- ✅ Private event · approval required · limited seats

 **Before you apply:** You must be registered for Agentic AI Build Week — **[👉 Register for Agentic AI Build Week](https://luma.com/gaf-hm61)** if you haven't yet. Seats are prioritised for Builder & Founding Builder ticket holders, so don't forget to [🚀](https://agentic-ai-build-week-2026.devpost.com/?utm_source=luma) **[Sign up for the AABW Buildathon on Devpost](https://agentic-ai-build-week-2026.devpost.com/?utm_source=luma)** **.**

 **👉 Apply now to request your seat. Approval required, and seats are filling fast.**

Location

Please register to see the exact location of this event.

Thành phố Hồ Chí Minh, Vietnam

[View on Google Maps](https://www.google.com/maps/search/?api=1&query=10.758415389331251%2C106.74467402085305)
